title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : soirée d'entreprise et confirmation RSVP
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions en faisant le lien entre eux.

passages.label: Invitation
passages.text:
You're Invited: End-of-Year Celebration

Date: December 18th
Time: 6:00 p.m. - 10:00 p.m.
Location: Skyline Rooftop Lounge, 8th Floor

Join us for an evening of food, music, and games to celebrate another great year together! Dinner will be served at 7:00 p.m., followed by an awards presentation and live music.

Dress code: Smart casual.

Please RSVP by December 5th using the link below, and let us know if you have any dietary restrictions or if you'll be bringing a guest (each employee may bring one guest).

passages.label: E-mail de confirmation RSVP
passages.text:
From: Events Team
To: Nadia Khoury
Subject: RSVP Confirmed - End-of-Year Celebration

Hi Nadia,

Thanks for your RSVP! We've noted that you'll be attending with one guest, and that you've requested a vegetarian meal for both of you.

A reminder: parking at the Skyline Rooftop Lounge is limited, so we recommend using public transportation or a taxi if possible.

We also wanted to let you know that the awards presentation has been moved earlier in the evening, right after dinner at 7:00 p.m., so that the live music can run a bit longer than originally planned.

See you on December 18th!

questions.prompt: What time will dinner be served?
By when were employees asked to RSVP?
How many guests is Nadia bringing?
questions.explanation: "We've noted that you'll be attending with one guest".

questions.prompt: What food request did Nadia make?
choices: A vegetarian meal for herself and her guest
questions.explanation: "you've requested a vegetarian meal for both of you".

questions.prompt: What change is mentioned in the RSVP confirmation email?
choices: The dress code has been removed
The awards presentation has been moved earlier
questions.explanation: "the awards presentation has been moved earlier in the evening, right after dinner".
